channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — May 20, 2026
item.description: Russian forces have launched deadly strikes across Ukraine, while a NATO F-16 has intercepted a drone over Estonia. Meanwhile, Chinese President Xi Jinping (SHEE jin-PING) has reportedly shared a warning with former US President Donald Trump regardin...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 18, 2026
item.description: This is The VENCAst, your daily briefing on global events, European affairs, and the latest in technology. I am your friendly neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you an objective and matter-of-fact overview of the news. Today is Monday, May 18, 202...

item.title: The VENCAst — May 17, 2026
item.description: A complex web of geopolitical tensions continues to unfold across the globe, from the Middle East, where a fragile ceasefire holds amidst targeted strikes and evolving drone warfare, to East Asia, where a US President's statements have prompted a sov...
